title: Fused entropy from logits - streaming vocab kernel (any size + BF16)
summary: Streaming Triton entropy kernel that supports large vocabularies and BF16 inputs without materializing softmax tensors.
success_gate: Preserve entropy parity across vocab sizes and BF16 inputs while materially beating the torch path on representative logits workloads.

results.note: Streaming single-pass kernel using online logsumexp trick. Old kernel was capped at V<=4096; new kernel handles any vocab size and BF16. Also upgraded compute_entropy_loss in future_kl.py to use this kernel and enable all 4 aggregation modes for the Triton path.

notes: Normalized from the legacy task-card schema on 2026-04-03 to restore queue validation.
